calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Aug-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, dba Great Western Collection Bureau's motion for attorneys' fees.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
No appearance by defendants Daly City Sushi & Seafood Buffet, Inc., a California corporation, dba Todai Restaurant, dba McSkewer; Chou Cheon Chang, a/k/a/ Choo Chen Chung, a/k/a Peter Chang, individually as guarantor of Daly City Sushi & Sefood Buffet, Inc.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau motion for attorneys' fees is GRANTED. Defendant Daly City Sushi & Seafood Buffet, Inc., a California corporation, dba Todai Restaurant, dba McSkewer; Chou Cheon Chang, a/k/a/ Choo Chen Chung, a/k/a Peter Chang, individually as guarantor of Daly City Sushi & Sefood Buffet, Inc., shall pay plaintiff $2,800.00 in attorneys' fees.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed order to the Court no later than August 20, 2009.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2009 Continued To Jul-24-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Robert Resner, Esq. for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Assoc., Inc., dba Great Western Collection BUreau.
Plaintiff's Witness Ronald Ableman was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Daly City Sushi & Seafood Buffet, Inc., a Californai Corp., dba Todai Restaurant, dba McSkewer; Chou Cheon Chang, aka Choo Chen Chung, aka Peter Chang, ind. as guarantor of Daly City Sushi & Seafood Buffet, Inc. as follows:
Damages $30,202.08
Prejudgment Interest $2,071.10
Costs $427.50, for a total of $32,700.68
Attorney's Fees pursuant to post judgment motion.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2009 Continued To Jun-12-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
